title: Body Asymmetry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1vm46","text":"This protocol describes a measure of asymmetry of images of body shapes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1misc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ao6ik","text":"Two judges have separately measured the asymmetry of our set of photographs portraying men and women.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"31ks5","text":"The inter-rater reliability for ABPI was excellent, r = .94 (α = .97). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9p3et","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Cristina Zogmaister
